next_experiment: Derive a Weil-specific tail inequality; do not extend finite matrix positivity by compactness alone.
claim_boundary: No conjecture proof and no certified conjecture counterexample.
proof_boundary: This is a generic route no-go, not a counterexample to the actual Weil form and not evidence against RH. TICKET130's strict-negative semidecision remains valid, but it is one-sided.
